tagline: Expert Pool & Landscaping Services in Vistancia, Peoria, AZ

hero.headline: One Team for Your Pool & Yard
hero.subheadline: Stop juggling multiple vendors. Pool & Landscaping of Vistancia handles everything — from crystal-clear pool water to a stunning desert landscape — all under one trusted roof in Peoria, AZ.
checkmarks: One company for pool AND landscaping

services.headline: Complete Pool & Landscaping Care
services.subtitle: Everything your Vistancia property needs — from water chemistry to curb appeal — handled by one expert team.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Crystal-clear water year-round with expert chemical balancing, skimming, brushing, filter care, and full equipment checks every visit.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems so your pool never skips a beat.

cards.title: Landscaping Design & Install
cards.description: Arizona-appropriate landscape design and installation that transforms your property with desert-smart plants and stunning curb appeal.

cards.title: Weekly Yard Maintenance
cards.description: Mowing, edging, trimming, weed removal, plant health checks, and full debris cleanup to keep your yard looking sharp every week.

cards.title: Irrigation & Hardscaping
cards.description: Complete irrigation install and repair plus custom pavers, artificial turf, and landscape lighting for the ultimate outdoor space.

cards.title: Property Inspections
cards.description: Detailed pool and yard inspections for home buyers or existing owners — get peace of mind about every inch of your property.

steps.title: Call or Text Brian
steps.description: Reach out at (602) 887-4400 and tell us about your pool and landscaping needs. We respond fast — usually same day.

steps.title: Get Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Brian personally visits your property to assess your pool, yard, and irrigation — then builds a custom care plan and transparent quote.

steps.title: Enjoy a Perfect Property
steps.description: Sit back while one team handles everything. Crystal-clear pool water and a beautiful yard — no vendor juggling required.

about.label: Locally Owned in Vistancia
about.headline: One Company. Pool & Yard. Done Right.
about.description: Founded by Brian Beckman in 2023, Pool & Landscaping of Vistancia was built to solve a simple problem: homeowners were tired of hiring one company for their pool and another for their yard — with neither delivering consistent results. Brian combined expert pool maintenance with professional landscaping under one roof, backed by responsive communication and real accountability. Every project gets hands-on owner involvement, and it shows — a perfect 5.0-star Google rating and BBB A+ accreditation prove that doing things the right way works.

features.title: Owner-Operated
features.description: Brian is personally involved in every account — real accountability from the person who built this company.

features.title: Arizona Desert Specialists
features.description: We know exactly what thrives in Peoria heat — your pool and landscape get care designed for this climate.

features.title: One Team, Zero Hassle
features.description: One invoice, one schedule, one team for both your pool and yard — no more juggling multiple vendors.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every property is different. We provide honest, upfront quotes after a free on-site assessment — no hidden fees, no pressure, just straightforward pricing for exactly what your pool and yard need.

guarantee.headline: Our Promise to Vistancia Homeowners
guarantee.description: We stand behind every visit with a satisfaction guarantee. If something is not right after a service, call Brian directly and we will make it right — no runaround, no excuses. Our 5.0-star rating across 51 reviews exists because we treat your property like our own.

faqs.question: Do you handle both pool AND landscaping for the same property?
faqs.answer: Absolutely — that is exactly what makes us different. One team, one schedule, one invoice for your pool and your yard. No juggling multiple vendors or dealing with inconsistent service.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve around Vistancia?
faqs.answer: We serve Vistancia, Peoria, Surprise, Glendale, North Phoenix, Fletcher Heights, Westwing Mountain, and surrounding Northwest Valley communities in ZIP codes 85382 and 85383.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are set up within a week. Call Brian at (602) 887-4400 for a free property assessment and we will get you on the schedule fast.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are a BBB Accredited Business with an A+ rating since June 2024. We carry full insurance for your peace of mind on every pool and landscaping job.

faqs.question: What if I only need pool service or only landscaping?
faqs.answer: No problem at all. Many clients start with one service and add the other later. We offer standalone pool maintenance and standalone landscaping — whatever your property needs.

testimonials.name: Joe Jacobs
testimonials.text: Brian Beckman is the best pool company we have ever used in our 30 years as a pool owner. He is dependable and very knowledgeable.

testimonials.name: Kat Israel
testimonials.text: Brian, Zack and the team have been amazing. Their integrity and professionalism are top notch. Hard working, timely, and always go above and beyond.

testimonials.name: Travis Allen
testimonials.text: Brian and his team did an amazing job cleaning up the front yard. Friendly and professional, everything looks fantastic.

contact.headline: Ready for a Hassle-Free Property?
contact.subtitle: Get a free assessment from Brian and see why 51 homeowners gave us a perfect 5-star rating.
benefits: No obligation, no pressure — just honest advice

footer.description: Pool & Landscaping of Vistancia delivers expert pool maintenance and professional landscaping to homeowners across Peoria and the Northwest Valley. One team, one standard of excellence.
footer.service_area: Proudly serving Vistancia, Peoria, Surprise, Glendale, North Phoenix, Fletcher Heights, Westwing Mountain, and surrounding communities.
